Class FileParsingContext

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.service.FileParsingContext
public class FileParsingContext extends Object
The FileParsingContext class utilizes the Strategy design pattern to handle different file parsing strategies. It allows for dynamic selection of parsing strategies for extracting event and customer data, as well as updating data.
Author:
Francisco Garcia

  • Method Details

    • setParsingStrategy

      public void setParsingStrategy(FileParsingStrategy strategyIn)
      Sets the file parsing strategy
      Parameters:
      strategyIn - the file parsing strategy to be set

    • extractEventData

      public void extractEventData(File fileIn, Map<Integer,Event> mapIn, Map<String,Venue> venueListIn)
      Extracts event data from a file using the current parsing strategy
      Parameters:
      fileIn - the file containing event data
      mapIn - the map to store extracted event data
      venueListIn - the list of venues for reference

    • extractCustomerData

      public void extractCustomerData(File fileIn, Map<String,Customer> mapIn)
      Extracts customer data from a file using the current parsing strategy
      Parameters:
      fileIn - the file containing customer data
      mapIn - the map to store extracted customer data

    • updateData

      public void updateData(Map<String,Customer> mapIn, Map<Integer,Event> eventMapIn)
      Updates data using the current parsing strategy
      Parameters:
      mapIn - the map of customers to be updated
      eventMapIn - the map of events to be updated
